name: Jahanvi Gupta
my_twin: I would develop a digital twin of my development environment and learning workflow to track my problem-solving patterns (similar to CodeAtlas). By mapping how I navigate codebases, query documentation, and structure APIs, I could feed this telemetry into an AI agent that proactively fetches context, detects architectural bottlenecks, and suggests optimized data pipelines before I even encounter a blocker.
